title: cleomella hillmanii var. goodrichii
intro: Cleomella hillmanii var. goodrichii, also known as Goodrich's cleome, is a plant species within the family Cleomaceae. It is commonly recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cleomella hillmanii var. goodrichii are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or oil to produce teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
